blocks.content: Silences live in the Alerting section of Grafana. In this milestone you navigate to the Silences page where you can view, create, and manage silences.
To navigate to the Silences page, complete the following steps:
In Grafana Cloud, navigate to **Alerts & IRM > Alerting > Silences** from the main menu.

You should see the Silences page with a table of existing silences (or an empty state if none exist yet).

In the next milestone, you create a new silence with label matchers and a duration.
